
---
title: "Predictive Inventory Optimisation Dashboard"
description: "Machine learning dashboard to optimise stock replenishment using sales data and seasonal trends."
author: "Ruairi Cullen"
date: 2026-04-18
categories: [Machine Learning, Data Analytics, Consultancy]
---

## Overview

Applied Consultancy Project · DCU  
Client: Agvance Ltd & Animal Farmacy  
Status: In progress  

Working with a 6-person team for a family-owned agri-nutrition wholesaler experiencing recurring stock-outs.

---

## Project Description

This project involves building a machine learning-powered dashboard that uses historical sales data and seasonal patterns to automate stock replenishment decisions.

The solution integrates with the client’s live systems:
- Shopify  
- Turbo  
- MINTsoft  

The project applies a **convergent mixed-methods research design**, combining:
- quantitative machine learning modelling  
- qualitative on-site observation  
- process mapping  
- semi-structured interviews with warehouse staff and the CEO  

---

## Skills Used

- CRISP-DM  
- PRISMA  
- Demand Forecasting  
- Business Process Mapping  
- Mixed Methods Research  

---

## Example Python Code

```{python}
import pandas as pd

# Example dataset (placeholder for real client data)
data = pd.DataFrame({
    "Month": ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar"],
    "Demand": [120, 150, 170]
})

data
